context: The video captures the moment a chef grills a seasoned marbled steak on a cast-iron pan in a minimal kitchen.

actions.description: The chef lowers the seasoned marbled steak onto the hot cast-iron grill pan.
The steak sizzles loudly, smoke rises, and early grill marks begin to form.
The chef adjusts the steak with tongs while herbs and spices toast on the surface.

temporal_caption: A chef places a seasoned marbled steak onto a hot cast-iron grill pan, where it sizzles, smokes, and begins to sear on a sleek black countertop.
